title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
summary: Google released a new commercial that reimagines the Declaration of Independence as if the Founding Fathers had access to modern AI and Google Workspace tools. The creative campaign humorously explores how artificial intelligence and collaborative technology might have influenced one of America's most foundational historical documents.
content: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?

zh.title: 谷歌新广告设想用人工智能帮助撰写《独立宣言》
zh.summary: 谷歌发布了一则新广告,重新想象了如果美国开国元勋能够获得现代AI和谷歌Workspace工具,《独立宣言》会是什么样子。这个创意活动幽默地探讨了人工智能和协作技术可能如何影响美国最具历史意义的基础文件之一。

title: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
summary: NASA launched a rescue mission with Katalyst Space Technologies' Link spacecraft to boost the Swift Observatory's orbit by 150 miles, preventing the 2004 telescope from burning up in Earth's atmosphere. Solar storms have degraded its altitude to a dangerous 224 miles, prompting the emergency intervention.
content:
Engineers from Katalyst Space Technologies testing Link. | Image: NASA/Scott Wiessinger	

The Swift Observatory was launched in 2004, but recent solar storms have pushed its orbit lower, and it's in danger of burning up in Earth's atmosphere as soon as this year. To try and stave off its demise, NASA has enlisted Katalyst Space Technologies. The company's Link spacecraft launched Friday with the goal of intercepting Swift, which has no propulsion system, and boosting its orbit back to its original position. Right now, Swift is circling at an altitude of 224 miles, and Link is aiming to raise that by about 150 miles.
Using a three-armed spacecraft to lift a satellite 150 miles higher into orbit is challenging enough, but the spee …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: NASA发起紧急任务阻止Swift天文台坠入地球
zh.summary: NASA与Katalyst太空技术公司合作，利用Link航天器发起救援任务，将Swift天文台的轨道提升150英里，防止这个2004年的望远镜在地球大气中燃烧。太阳风暴将其高度降低到危险的224英里，促发了这次紧急干预。

title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
summary: Midjourney is seeking to compel three Hollywood studios to reveal details of their AI usage as part of an ongoing legal dispute. The demand appears designed to support Midjourney's defense against copyright infringement allegations.
content: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

zh.title: Midjourney要求好莱坞制片厂披露其AI使用情况
zh.summary: 作为正在进行的法律纠纷的一部分，Midjourney试图迫使三家好莱坞制片厂披露其AI使用情况的细节。这一要求似乎是为了支持Midjourney针对版权侵权指控的辩护。

title: Review: Supergirl is not the disaster its low box office suggests
summary: Ars Technica reviews Supergirl as a solid film that underperformed at the box office because it needed to be exceptional rather than merely good. The movie struggles in an increasingly oversaturated superhero market.
content: It’s a pretty good movie, but it needed to be a great movie to thrive in an oversaturated superhero market.

zh.title: 评论：Supergirl并非其低票房所暗示的灾难
zh.summary: Ars Technica评论指出，Supergirl是一部扎实的电影，票房表现不佳是因为它需要表现出色而不仅仅是不错。这部电影在日益饱和的超级英雄市场中苦苦挣扎。

title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
summary: Alibaba has classified Claude Code as high-risk software and reportedly banned employees from using it. The move reflects growing organizational concerns about AI coding assistant security and safety.
content: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴据报禁止员工使用Claude Code
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴已将Claude Code列为高风险软件，并据报禁止员工使用。此举反映了组织对AI编码助手安全性的日益增长的担忧。

title: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
summary: The US Department of Energy deleted approximately 6,000 energy conservation webpages during a historic heatwave, following Republican political backlash against conservation requests. The deletion occurred after criticism of recommendations to set thermostats to 78 degrees.
content:
The US Department of Energy reportedly deleted about 6,000 pages related to energy conservation as a historic heatwave tears across the country. 
The deletion was suspiciously timed, following Republican outrage over Mayor Zohran Mamdani asking New Yorkers to help reduce strain on the grid by setting their AC to 78 degrees. Republicans like Ted Cruz (who has famously fled severe weather in his home state), Nikki Haley, and Representative Nancy Mace (South Carolina) quickly pounced, framing the request as socialism and an act of war on women in menopause (the Republican Party is notoriously concerned about women's health).
Of course, this i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 美国热浪期间，白宫删除数千页能源节约网页
zh.summary: 在历史性热浪期间，美国能源部删除了约6,000个能源节约网页，此举是对共和党人对节约请求政治反弹的回应。删除发生在针对将温度调至78华氏度建议的批评之后。

title: Matic’s robot vacuum is getting a $250 price hike in September
summary: Matic is raising its popular robot vacuum price by $250 to $1,495 starting September 9th, citing tenfold increases in component costs. The company is offsetting the increase with a year's supply of free replacement bags and an extended return window.
content:
The Matic is our favorite robot vacuum by a pretty comfortable margin. If you’ve been thinking about buying one, you may want to plan on doing it sooner than later. The company will raise its price by $250 on September 9th, going from $1,245 to $1,495. Matic told The Verge that the new price reflects its rising costs for memory and other components for the vacuum, which it says are now tenfold.
Those who buy one directly from the company will get a year’s worth of replacement bags worth $96 at no extra cost. Each refill contains 12 bags, and they ship for free. Additionally, Matic has increased their return policy from 60 days to six months.
Matic
A different kind of robot vacuum and mop, Matic reinvents the floor cleaning machine.

Where to Buy:

 $1245 at Matic

Our reviewer Jennifer Pattison Tuohy praised the Matic’s “human-like navigation,” noting in her review that it got stuck only twice during six months of use. In her cluttered (Jen’s words, not mine), three-story home with pets, thick rugs, and high transitions, it handled difficult layouts with ease while delivering powerful suction and a great self-cleaning roller mop. It’ll continue vacuuming even if its water tank runs dry, and it’s quiet enough to let it run without becoming a distraction if you work from home.
It also requires very little maintenance. Rather than relying on a big multifunction dock, it carries its own water tank and stores dirty water in a disposable bag, so you’ll only need to empty and clean its dirty water reservoir. It even drives itself to the sink when it needs more water. Unlike many competing robot vacuums, it can also operate entirely offline, with maps and other data stored locally instead of in the cloud.
Read our Matic review.

zh.title: Matic扫地机器人九月将涨价$250
zh.summary: Matic从9月9日起将其扫地机器人价格上调$250至$1,495，理由是配件成本增加了十倍。该公司通过提供一年的免费替换袋供应和延长退货期限来抵消价格上升。

title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
summary: Mistral AI, founded in 2023, offers open-source AI models and has secured substantial funding to democratize access to frontier AI technology. The French company positions itself as a direct competitor to OpenAI.
content: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

zh.title: Mistral AI是什么？关于OpenAI竞争对手你需要知道的一切
zh.summary: 成立于2023年的Mistral AI提供开源AI模型，并获得了巨额融资以实现前沿AI技术的民主化获取。这家法国公司将自己定位为OpenAI的直接竞争对手。

title: Flatbush Zombies’ Erick the Architect misses his BlackBerry keyboard
summary: Erick the Architect, producer for Flatbush Zombies, released a new disco and reggae-influenced single "No Doubt (I'm In Love)" while expressing nostalgia for BlackBerry keyboards. The artist has established a notable career including major collaborations and a memorable Apple WWDC appearance.
content:
That is the face of a man who enjoys what he does. | Image: Reato Morris	

Erick the Architect is a founding member of, and the primary producer for, the legendary Flatbush Zombies. He's toured the world, performed on Kimmel and Fallon, played Coachella, and collaborated with everyone from Joey Bada$$ and the Rza to James Blake and hardcore punk band Trash Talk. But perhaps the most unexpected collab was with Apple, when Erick popped up following Tim Cook's final WWDC presentation to rap about apps. That was just a precursor to him dropping his new disco and reggae-tinged single, "No Doubt (I'm In Love)."

The new track, produced by Yeti Beats and Federico Vindver, is definitely a shift in tone from the darker, gri …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Flatbush Zombies的Erick the Architect怀念他的黑莓键盘
zh.summary: Flatbush Zombies制作人Erick the Architect发布了受迪斯科和雷鬼影响的新单曲《No Doubt (I'm In Love)》，同时表达了对黑莓键盘的怀念。这位艺术家建立了杰出的职业生涯，包括重大合作和一次难忘的Apple WWDC演讲。

title: Hey number pad lovers, this is a keyboard we can finally agree on
summary: The Verge reviews the Epomaker RT98 mechanical keyboard, which features a modular number pad that can be positioned on either side as a budget-friendly compromise. The keyboard combines retro aesthetics, VIA compatibility, and solid typing feel alongside some design quirks.
content:
I’m right-hand dominant but a lefty at heart. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

I know a vocal group of people who swear by the number pad on their keyboard. And yet, for years I haven't cared about using one - until I put my hands on the Epomaker RT98. It's a mechanical keyboard with a charming retro aesthetic, a fun CRT-like screen, VIA compatibility, a nice typing feel, and most importantly, a modular number pad that can be moved to either side. It's a clever compromise in a budget friendly-ish board, allowing you to further customize your setup without losing the functionality of the coveted "tenkey." 
But like many mechanical keyboards out there, it's got some unique quirks and tradeoffs.
Epomaker RT98


Score: 7

Pr …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 嘿，数字键盘爱好者，这是我们终于能同意的键盘
zh.summary: The Verge评测了Epomaker RT98机械键盘，其模块化数字小键盘可以放在任一侧，作为一个经济实惠的折衷方案。该键盘融合了复古美学、VIA兼容性和扎实的打字手感，但也有一些设计特点。

title: The square-ish phone that I wanted to love
summary: The Verge reviews the Ikko MindOne Pro, a compact phone with a square screen and innovative features including a flipping camera for selfies and optional keyboard accessory. Despite multiple attempts to make the device work—testing it as a standard phone, a minimalist launcher platform, and a dumb phone—the reviewer found it fundamentally disappointing. The clever design innovations cannot overcome deeper usability and functionality shortcomings.
content:
A great concept that falls flat.	

The Ikko MindOne Pro is delightfully small.
I keep calling it a square phone, which isn't quite right; the screen is square, but the phone itself is slightly rectangular. The camera flips up so you can use it for selfies - you can even open it partway to use as a stand or a kind of PopSocket. There's a Clicks-style keyboard accessory that also adds a magnetic ring and a headphone jack. I tried so hard to like it, but this phone is a miss no matter how you look at it.
I used it like a normal phone. I downloaded a minimalist launcher and tried using it as kind of a dumb phone. I put the keyboard case on. I took the keyboard case off. Nothing …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我曾想爱上的那款方形手机
zh.summary: The Verge评测了Ikko MindOne Pro，一款屏幕为方形设计的紧凑型手机，具有创新功能，包括可翻转的自拍摄像头和可选的键盘配件。尽管评测者尝试了多种使用方式——将其当作标准手机、极简启动器平台和功能机——但最终发现这款手机根本令人失望。巧妙的设计创新无法弥补其更深层的可用性和功能缺陷。

title: The fanfiction community is at war with AI — and itself
summary: Fanfiction communities have initiated a movement to identify and remove AI-generated works, citing concerns about tools like Claude and ChatGPT. The detection methods being employed are unreliable and risk misidentifying human-written content as AI-generated, creating internal community conflict. The initiative highlights tension between creators' desire to preserve the community and the practical difficulty of reliably detecting AI-written submissions.
content:
Fanfiction communities are trying to hunt down writers who haven’t written works with their own hands. | Image: Álvaro Bernis / The Verge	

Over the past week, a new fanworks movement has kicked off, with the aim to root out authors using generative AI. But the detection methods being implemented are questionable, and any fanfic writer could be caught in the crossfire.
Broad distaste around the use of Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI tools has long been a thing in creative communities, including the world of fanfiction. Readers and writers have passed around tips for spotting supposedly AI-generated works, citing anything from em dashes to the broad concept of purple prose. But on June 29th, an anonymous X account called @heatedrivalryai promised a seemingly more reliable solution …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 同人文社区与AI及自身的对抗
zh.summary: 同人文社区已启动一项运动，旨在识别和删除AI生成的作品，声称对Claude和ChatGPT等工具感到担忧。所采用的检测方法并不可靠，存在将人类创作的内容误判为AI生成的风险，引起社区内部冲突。这一举措凸显了创作者想要保护社区与实际难以可靠检测AI创作投稿之间的紧张关系。

title: When the ability to smell goes away
summary: Loss of smell is frequently associated with underlying brain health issues, suggesting olfactory disturbances may serve as an important medical warning sign. Researchers are investigating the connections between sensory disruptions and neurological conditions. Early detection of smell loss could help identify serious health problems before they progress.
content: Disturbances in this critical sense are often linked to problems with brain health.

zh.title: 当嗅觉消失时
zh.summary: 嗅觉丧失常常与潜在的脑部健康问题相关，这表明嗅觉障碍可能是一个重要的医学警示信号。研究人员正在调查感觉障碍与神经系统疾病之间的关联。早期发现嗅觉丧失可以帮助在严重健康问题恶化之前及时识别。

title: A martian rock has lots of carbon on it, and it's not clear why
summary: Scientists discovered a Martian rock with unusually high carbon content, raising questions about the sample's origins. Biological processes could theoretically explain the finding, but several other mechanisms may also be responsible. The discovery adds to the ongoing investigation of Mars' geology and whether conditions ever supported life.
content: Biology could explain the find, but there are other potential explanations.

zh.title: 火星岩石含有大量碳，原因不明
zh.summary: 科学家发现了一块含有异常高碳含量的火星岩石，这引发了人们对样本来源的疑问。从理论上讲，生物过程可以解释这一发现，但其他几种机制也可能是原因。这一发现为持续的火星地质学研究补充了新信息，也涉及火星是否曾经存在支持生命的条件这一问题。

title: Qi fan fan
summary:
The Kuxiu D5 keeps Qi-compatible phones cool while also charging a watch and earbuds.	

Despite my initial skepticism, I'm now sold on wireless Qi chargers that add integrated fans to keep your phone
content:
The Kuxiu D5 keeps Qi-compatible phones cool while also charging a watch and earbuds.	

Despite my initial skepticism, I'm now sold on wireless Qi chargers that add integrated fans to keep your phone cool while charging. I figured they'd be too loud, or too weak, or too gimmicky, but I'm a convert after spending a week with the new $59.99 Kuxiu D5 Qi2.2 charging dock. Its active cooling system has kept my phone from heating up, unlike every other Qi charger I've tried. Good thing, given my own history with an overheating phone.
Last year I fried the logic board on my titanium iPhone 15 Pro. I was on a sweltering train and trying to edit a 4K video on my phone, which was charging from a magnetically attached Qi power bank. Oof, …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Qi冷却风扇
zh.summary: Kuxiu D5可以为Qi兼容手机散热，同时还能为手表和耳塞充电。尽管我最初持怀疑态度，但现在我已经爱上了这种内置风扇的无线Qi充电器。
